title: CSMCRI Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Functional Area Expert Posts
description: The Central Salt and Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSMCRI) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Functional Area Expert Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech in Civil Engineering can apply for the CSMCRI Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the ed...
